title: Maser voice-stream
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Maser voice-streams''', also known as the '''Oswaft language''', were the communications medium and weapons of the [[Oswaft]] species.

Their language was complex and highly sophisticated, with communication being performed by modulating radio-frequency waves with their brains. The [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]]-breathers were also able to "speak" a picture-message intended to convey visual reality rather than pure ideas.

Oswaft were able to employ this type of communication in the form of [[maser]] bolt. They referred to this as "shouting" at their opponent. The Oswaft were capable of destroying [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fighters in a single "shout", and could also destroy unshielded [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. However, maser voice-streams were generally ineffective against [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]'' {{1st}}
